name: Andover Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Andover Community Center in Andover, MN! There are 9 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Austin Park
description: Austin Park is a place to play pickleball in Circle Pines, MN. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: BPZ
description: BPZ is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Ramsey, MN. There are 3 indoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A membership is required to play.

name: Central Park
description: Come play pickleball at Central Park in Ramsey, MN! There are 6 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: George Enloe Park
description: George Enloe Park is a place to play pickleball in Anoka, MN. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms.

name: Ham Lake
description:
There’s a picnic table outside of the courts. 
Decent porta-potty. 
The courts are actually between Ham Lake Park & City Hall

name: In The Game Pickleball and Golf
description: Come play pickleball at In The Game Pickleball and Golf in Ramsey, MN! There are 5 indoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Reservations are available. Players have access to food, restrooms, water, youth programming, lights, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and adaptive programming. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Lexington Athletic Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Lexington Athletic Complex in Blaine, MN! There are 10 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Lifetime Fitness Club - Fridley
description: Come play pickleball at Lifetime Fitness Club - Fridley in Fridley, MN! There are 12 hard courts. 8 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like lights. A membership is required to play.

name: Moore Lake Pickleball Courts
description: Moore Lake Pickleball Courts is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fridley, MN. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Oak Grove Preserve
description: Come play pickleball at Oak Grove Preserve in Oak Grove, MN! There is 1 outdoor asphalt court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is free.
address: Viking Boulevard Northwest & Kiowa St NW
hours: 8 am - 4:00 pm (Monday-Friday) Phone: (763) 404-7000 Fax: (763) 404-7001 Site Map Government Websites by Catalis | Privacy Policy

name: Riverwind Park
description: Come play pickleball at Riverwind Park in Coon Rapids, MN! There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Rudy Johnson Park
description: Come play pickleball at Rudy Johnson Park in Anoka, MN! There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Sandburg Edu Ctr
description: Sandburg Edu Ctr is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Anoka, MN. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Sunny Acres Park
description: Sunny Acres Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Anoka, MN. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: The Picklr Blaine
description: Come play pickleball at The Picklr Blaine in Blaine, MN! There are 8 indoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms, a pro shop or equipment store, trainers or lessons, and locker rooms.
